name: Apex International Co., Ltd.
summary: Apex International Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells printed circuit boards in Taiwan. The company offers double-sided and multi-layer printed circuit boards for use in LCD TVs, hard disks, printers, set-top boxes, router, telephone, car audio, and navigator. It also exports its products. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Grand Cayman, Cayman Islands.
